rule.name: SwiftUI ATS Relaxation Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects ATS relaxation indicators relevant to SwiftUI apps.
rule.vuln_desc: ATS relaxation can weaken network transport security guarantees.
rule.developer: Keep ATS strict and minimize exceptions.
rule.reviewer: Review transport security keys in Info. plist. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Insecure URL Usage
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext endpoint references in SwiftUI projects.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext transport can leak sensitive request/response data.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS only and enforce secure networking defaults.
rule.reviewer: Audit endpoint strings and networking clients. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Dynamic Web Content Injection Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects web content execution points in SwiftUI-integrated views.
rule.vuln_desc: Untrusted web/script content can increase XSS-like attack surface.
rule.developer: Restrict untrusted content and harden web view interactions.
rule.reviewer: Review web view wrappers and script execution boundaries. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Insecure Certificate Handling Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects certificate trust bypass indicators in network challenge handlers.
rule.vuln_desc: Weak trust decisions can enable MITM interception.
rule.developer: Implement strict trust evaluation and remove bypass logic.
rule.reviewer: Inspect networking trust challenge handlers. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Sensitive Data in UserDefaults Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects potential secret storage in UserDefaults.
rule.vuln_desc: Storing secrets in UserDefaults increases extraction risk.
rule.reviewer: Review storage APIs for token/credential keys. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Pasteboard Sensitive Data Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects pasteboard usage that may expose sensitive data.
rule.vuln_desc: Clipboard data may leak to unintended contexts.
rule.developer: Avoid clipboard for sensitive data where possible.
rule.reviewer: Audit clipboard operations and data classification. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: SwiftUI Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets can be extracted from app artifacts.
rule.developer: Externalize secrets and rotate compromised values.
rule.reviewer: Validate no production secrets are committed. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
